name: LinkFinder AI — Lead Name + Company → LinkedIn → Full Profile

parameters.content:
## 🔑 API Key Setup

Find your API key in the **API Access** section of your [linkfinderai.com](https://linkfinderai.com) account.

Then replace `{{Insert-api-key}}` in every **Linkfinder** node with your actual key.

parameters.formTitle: Lead Enrichment — Name to Full Profile
parameters.formDescription: Enter leads as 'Full Name, Company' — one per line.

values.placeholder:
Bill Gates, Microsoft
Elon Musk, Tesla
Sam Altman, OpenAI
values.fieldDescription: Format: Full Name, Company — one per line

parameters.jsCode:
const lead = $('One Lead at a Time').first().json;
return [{ json: { input_name: lead.full_name || '', input_company: lead.company_name || '', status: 'linkedin_url_not_found' } }];

nodes.name: → Connect Your CRM Here
nodes.notes:
📤 Connect your destination here:
• HubSpot → 'Create/Update Contact'
• Pipedrive → 'Create Person'
• Salesforce → 'Create Record'
• Airtable, Notion, HTTP webhook...
